horoscope: Venus enters your work and health sector today, dear Aries, and will stay for a transit that lasts until August 6th. You seek a better environment in your daily life in the weeks ahead, and you tend to do what you can to make your tasks and chores pleasant. Cooperating with others brings work rewards. It’s a useful cycle for bringing harmony to your daily life or more enjoyment in pursuing health and wellness. This can also be a time for better relationships with health professionals, employees, or co-workers, as applicable. Today, you're in a better position to see what's truly valuable to you, even with some tension from feeling rushed.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Taurus, and life seems to be stirring up your emotions, as well as your initiative. The coming weeks bring new energy to your love life or creative pursuits with Venus beginning its transit of your solar fifth house today. Until August 6th, your magnetism is strong and building. You tend to share your affection more freely and receive love and compliments more confidently. This Venus cycle supports you as you naturally attract who and what you want into your life. There are some wonderful opportunities today, but also some obstacles. Fortunately, there is good energy with you for repairing, healing, and enjoying relationships, friendship, and love.

With the Moon in your privacy sector all day, dear Gemini, you might aim to take things easy and focus on renewal, regeneration, and healing. It can be hard to tear yourself away, but consider doing so if you’ve been consuming too much information. Also today, Venus heads into your solar fourth house, where it will transit until August 6th. In the coming weeks, you have a real drive to experience more harmony, comfort, beauty, and balance in your home environment and family life. Safety, prosperity, and familiarity seem to drive your love life, spending habits, and pastimes or pleasures. If you need to repair or refresh your relationships with family, it's an excellent time to do so. Real estate matters can be favorable. Regarding questions of the heart, you're most interested in familiarity and intimacy. Today's transits might serve to pull up some buried frustrations in spots, but it's excellent for improving your relationships.

The Moon spends the day in your social sector, dear Cancer, and Venus moves into your communications house, bringing a more lively spirit to your life. Venus will transit here until August 6th, and communication is integral to your feelings of being loved and appreciated in the weeks ahead. Fortunately, you are presenting your ideas and comments with charm and ease during this cycle. Making social connections and sharing your thoughts come more smoothly and naturally during this mostly upbeat period. You may thoroughly enjoy your studies, games, learning, and connecting during this period. Today, you may be presenting your ideas or your case to build trust or win others' favor. If there have been relationship difficulties, you might feel a nice rush of optimism and energy to repair them.

Venus leaves your sign today, dear Leo, and while the next step may not seem as glamorous, it's a natural progression and a solid one. Now that the attention turns away from you and your ego needs, you're in a better position to enjoy yourself without self-consciousness. The focus is on building your resources, and it feels good to do so. Love is more about security and comfort in the coming weeks while Venus visits your solar second house until August 6th. Affections stabilize during this cycle, and you value simpler pleasures. Getting along well with others can be a way to boost your business or income, and relationships you already have can benefit from steadier energy. You value those who make you feel comfortable, and familiarity is more important to you than new experiences in love at this time. There can be increased income, or it's a great time to enjoy, explore, and develop your talents. While there's some tendency to overthink today, your instincts for what is truly valuable to you are strong. This might seem straightforward, but in fact, we are not always in touch with what we really want and what means the most to us, and this can apply to both tangibles and intangibles. Today, circumstances are such that you see these things more clearly, and you are less likely to question commitments.

Venus enters your sign for an almost four-week stay, dear Virgo. In the past few weeks with Venus in your privacy sector, feelings may have been kept private or at bay. You're now more noticeable, and you stand out for your charm. You're also clearer about your feelings. You may feel that you're beginning a new cycle in love. You're more inclined to enjoy and pamper yourself from now until August 6th. You are at your most attractive or appealing, and, generally speaking, the good vibes you give out to the world are likely to be returned to you many times over. While today can have its tense spots, people are especially drawn to your wisdom, advice, and support, and they see your opinions and perspective as unique and standout.

You may be feeling close to a friend or kindred spirit today, dear Libra. Connections made now can be intriguing and even inspiring. An introspective turn is likely, with Venus moving in your privacy sector. Until August 6th, your planetary ruler encourages spending more time to yourself, going under the radar in some areas of life, and sorting out or processing your feelings. External or material achievement is less significant to you than what's going on in your private life in the weeks ahead. You may be a little more tentative than usual about your affections and even purchases during this cycle. You may instinctively sense that you're not quite ready for brand new beginnings. With a Venus-Chiron transit influencing today, there could be a nice opportunity to revitalize a relationship or reconnect with your inner world.

Venus begins its transit of your friendship sector today, dear Scorpio, and this transit is an enhancing one. Teamwork is favored, and friendships can get a nice boost during this cycle that sticks with you until August 6th. You are more willing than usual to accommodate, change, and grow in your interactions, and far less likely to stick with old patterns that are no longer performing. The weeks ahead can also be a good time for business income. The focus is on equality and positive energy in love, and friends are likely to be very supportive now. Venus heads into a wonderful aspect with Chiron today, making it a particularly auspicious time to open up and enjoy more comfortable, flowing, and gentle interactions with others.

Responsibilities in love become clearer in the coming weeks, dear Sagittarius, with Venus traveling through your solar tenth house until August 6th. Using charm at work is especially effective, as you are appreciated for how you cooperate with others. It's a good influence for your public image and professional endeavors. You can bring more polish to relations on the job, and higher-ups tend to look upon you favorably during this cycle. There can be a boost in your reputation now. It's a time for catching some breaks if needed. You might thoroughly enjoy mapping out plans for your future in the weeks ahead. An especially strong aspect for relating is now active, encouraging a humble, growth-oriented approach to your relationships.

Venus begins its transit of your solar ninth house today, dear Capricorn, and you can feel as if your feelings or love life are emerging into the light. In this cycle that lasts until August 6th, you're less likely to linger or dwell on your feelings or overthink them, as you tend to embrace the moment and express or act upon your affections. With Venus moving in harmony with your sign now, your natural qualities are more appreciated by others. You're attracted to people, entertainment, art, and studies that feed your sense of adventure or excitement. You are more inclined to seek out the things and people that/who make you happy. Relationships are learning experiences for you during this cycle. Do be careful not to set your goals so high that you can't get any particular project off the ground, however. While today's energies are sometimes impatient, a Venus-Chiron aspect coming into play encourages flowing feelings and an honest, upfront, and magical approach to love and creativity.

Venus moves into your solar eighth house today, dear Aquarius, for a stay until August 6th. In the weeks ahead, your relationships may become more complex. Deeper, more profound relationships are in favor, however, and it’s a fine time to gain a better understanding of yourself and your needs. Resolving differences can be in focus and positive. Backing or support may be easier to come by, or you might arrive at an attractive agreement during this cycle. You tend to seek more depth or passion in your relationships, projects, personal interests, or pleasures. It’s also a good time to get the most out of others’ talents and resources. Today's transits can be tense in spots, but a Venus-Chiron aspect comes into play and is one of the better ones for finding beautiful reasons to enjoy one another.

Venus moves into your partnership sector today, dear Pisces, and will stay until August 6th. This transit can enhance your social life and one-to-one relationships. It’s a healthy cycle for attracting and improving close connections. Benefits can come through partnering, counseling, or negotiating in the weeks ahead. You’re inclined to pay special attention to your relationships, restoring balance and harmony. Others are more likely to help and support you. In turn, your sense of what people need is strong. Today, there's some tendency to communicate too quickly. However, connections and attachments, as well as emotions and feelings, tend to take over. Personal appeal is good, and you might enjoy a feeling of warmth and faithfulness in a relationship, particularly as you open up and allow yourself to feel a little vulnerable.
